name: Heirloom Tomato Salad and Basil SEA Salt
intro: IN AUGUST, heirloom tomatoes are at their peak, and you should be able to find them at your local farmers’ market, some natural food stores, and, increasingly, at conventional supermarkets.

ingredients.item: heirloom tomatoes of varying shapes, sizes, and colors
Best-quality extra-virgin olive oil, for drizzling

method: Cut the tomatoes in various styles—a mix of halves, quarters, and slices—to enhance presentation.
Divide the tomatoes evenly among 4 plates, drizzle with oil, and sprinkle with Basil Salt and black pepper to taste.
